documentation_impact.rationale: The delivery batch changes operator-facing workflow and policy-reference surfaces across AGENTS, active-memory guidance, persona procedure notes, and feature delivery artifacts.

deferred_items.rationale: The local diff contains carry-over paths outside touch-set.json (including src/internal/packages/@pancreator/cli/src/index.ts), so the operator should ratify or reconcile touch-set scope before governed commit.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The ship artifact preserves the human-ratified gate by recording evidence without committing, pushing, advancing stages, or crossing into librarian closure.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The artifact records documentation-impact and explicit deferral linkage so governance decisions remain traceable during bootstrap best-effort enforcement.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The recorded checks and deferral-protocol evidence support the PRD goals for supervised pipelines, durable memory stewardship, and auditable operator tooling behavior.
